query: The compiled voice file for our brand is 7,200 tokens. Our AI context window is limited.
expected_behavior: Runs a second-pass audit targeting the longest sections first
Applies the Signal-to-Noise test to every remaining line: does this change how an AI writes the next sentence?
Cuts anything that passes the test with 'maybe' — only high-confidence lines survive
Does NOT summarize sections — compresses by removing low-signal lines entirely
Delivers a file under 5,000 tokens with the highest-signal content preserved
